nasb.text: Now while they were passing through the cities, they were delivering the decrees which had been decided upon by the apostles and elders who were in Jerusalem, for them to observe.

esv.text: As they went on their way through the cities, they delivered to them for observance the decisions that had been reached by the apostles and elders who were in Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 他們經過各城，把耶路撒冷的使徒和長老所定的規條，交給門徒遵守。

ccb.text: 他们走遍各城，把耶路撒冷的使徒和长老所定下的规条教导当地的门徒遵守。

csbs.text: 当他们经过那些城镇的时候，就把耶路撒冷的使徒们和长老们所定的规条，传达给大家遵守。
